IT'S MAH DREAM FOREVER :oops: Love Always Yuko-chan

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Fri Nov 11, 2005 3:50 pm tee hee hee yes cause the i would have to beat their ass Love always Yuko-chan

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Fri Nov 11, 2005 3:52 pm Evangelionfreak wrote: tee hee hee yes cause the i would have to beat their ass Love always Yuko-chan

[]:             Quote Post by superdoughboy4 » Fri Nov 11, 2005 3:55 pm Space Penis wrote: Evangelionfreak wrote: tee hee hee yes cause the i would have to beat their ass Love always Yuko-chan

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Fri Nov 11, 2005 3:55 pm yes I have beaten Shinji's ass many times, he doesnt learn. Love always Yuko-chan

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Fri Nov 11, 2005 5:15 pm superdoughboy4 wrote: At least it's not a guy, obsessive over Kawouru as you are.

[]:             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Fri Nov 11, 2005 6:50 pm You may say you're straight, and that you'd never accept Kaworu's angelic meat. But remember--no doubt that's what Shinji thought, too, before he met him. After all, it's not like you ever saw him hanging around the locker room with Toji and Kensuke. Instead he made his moves towards Asuka and Rei. Well, maybe "moves" is putting it too strong. They were more like twitches. Anyway, Shinji thought he was all man until he ran into Kaworu. Ritsuko's tests had established he was actually only 34.6% man, but Shinji didn't know that. We can see from the show that it's difficult to fight off an Angel's advance even when you're in an Eva Unit. Imagine trying it in the bathroom, with nothing but a towel to snap.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Fri Nov 11, 2005 7:14 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: superdoughboy4 wrote: At least it's not a guy, obsessive over Kawouru as you are.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sat Nov 12, 2005 8:10 am Since this seems like a worthless thread and might just get closed soon let me add this about pissant boy: :twisted: :twisted: Kaworu Sucks :twisted: :twisted: And before you say anything back factor in that I was at least nice enough to use his real name and I actually spelt it right. Normally I like to spell it Kawuro just to piss his fan boys/girls off.
